gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/179)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/179)
text: النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) الْخَالُ وَارِثُ مَنْ لَا وَارِثَ لَهُ .

en.hubeali: And the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> has said: ‘The maternal uncle is an inheritor of the one who has not (other) inheritor for him’.
en.sarwar: 9. The Holy Prophet, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said: ‘A maternal uncle inherits one who has no other heirs.’” [Note: The next several pages of the Arabic text are the words of al-Fadl and are not translated.]
